title: GOOD: mine-wait budget documented with slack calculation
description: The receive-side verification in testnet_shielded_payment_end_to_end() documents the time budget explicitly in a comment: 'mine-wait <= 300 s, scan <= 120 s; together 420 s within PAYMENT_TIMEOUT_SECS'. PAYMENT_TIMEOUT_SECS is 600, leaving 180s of slack. The 30s poll interval for mine-wait is appropriate for Zcash testnet (~75s block time): it detects mining within one poll cycle after a block arrives without hammering the server. The inner timeout (300s) and outer timeout (600s) are separate so scan failures do not consume the mine-wait budget and vice versa.
